next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes
Excisional lymph node biopsy if EBUS is nondiagnostic
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme and lysozyme levels
Synovial fluid analysis of the knee
Fungal and mycobacterial cultures of respiratory specimens
Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal lymph nodes for cytology and cultures
Cardiac MRI to evaluate for cardiac sarcoidosis or other infiltrative processes
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and lysozyme levels
Comprehensive rheumatologic panel (ANA, ANCA, ESR, CRP)
Synovial fluid analysis of the right knee
PET/CT scan to assess metabolic activity of nodal and pulmonary lesions
